title: Maa Jhanjiri Mangala Temple
tagline: Maa Jhanjiri Mangala Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: The Maa Jhanjiri Mangala Temple, or Jhanjiri Mangala Mandir is an ancient Hindu mandir (temple) dedicated to Mangala (Maa Mangala ), the presiding deity of the Cuttack City in Odis
overview.description: The Maa Jhanjiri Mangala Temple, or Jhanjiri Mangala Mandir is an ancient Hindu mandir (temple) dedicated to Mangala (Maa Mangala ), the presiding deity of the Cuttack City in Odisha, India. One of numerous temples in Cuttack, it is located at the area of Jhanjiri Mangala and is known also as Mangala Temple at Jhanjirimangala Square. During the annual festival of Durga Puja, the temple and its surroundings are extensively adorned with different types of lights, bamboo/ply gates, paper triangles, and other decorations.

topPlaces.name: Board of Secondary Education, Odisha
topPlaces.description: The Board of Secondary Education, Odisha (abbreviated B.S.E) is a board of education for government, public and private schools under the state government of Odisha, India.

topPlaces.name: Ravenshaw Radio
topPlaces.description: Ravenshaw Radio is the community radio station (CRS) of Ravenshaw University, Cuttack, Odisha, India. It is the first campus community radio station in Odisha, and was launched on 14 April 2011, the Oriya New Year.

topPlaces.name: Cuttack Chandi Temple
topPlaces.description: The Kataka Chandi Temple is a temple dedicated to the Hindu goddess Chandi in Cuttack, Odisha, India, near the banks of the Mahanadi River.

topPlaces.name: Link Road, Cuttack
topPlaces.description: Link Road is a road in Cuttack, Odisha, India. It runs east from Link road cross at one end to Badambadi circle at the other.

topPlaces.name: Barabati Stadium
topPlaces.description: The Barabati Stadium is an Indian sports stadium used mostly for cricket and association football, and also sometimes for concerts and field hockey, located in Cuttack, Odisha. It is a regular venue for international cricket and is the home ground of Odisha cricket team.

topPlaces.name: Archdiocese of Cuttack-Bhubaneswar
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Cuttack-Bhubaneswar (Latin: Cuttacken(sis)-Bhubanesvaren(sis)) is an archdiocese located in the cities of Cuttack, Bhubaneswar and covering the entire Kandhamal district in India.

Ravenshaw Radio is the community radio station (CRS) of Ravenshaw University, Cuttack, Odisha, India. It is the first campus community radio station in Odisha, and was launched on 14 April 2011, the Oriya New Year.
The Kataka Chandi Temple is a temple dedicated to the Hindu goddess Chandi in Cuttack, Odisha, India, near the banks of the Mahanadi River.
Link Road is a road in Cuttack, Odisha, India. It runs east from Link road cross at one end to Badambadi circle at the other.

The Barabati Stadium is an Indian sports stadium used mostly for cricket and association football, and also sometimes for concerts and field hockey, located in Cuttack, Odisha. It is a regular venue for international cricket and is the home ground of Odisha cricket team.

The Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Cuttack-Bhubaneswar (Latin: Cuttacken(sis)-Bhubanesvaren(sis)) is an archdiocese located in the cities of Cuttack, Bhubaneswar and covering the entire Kandhamal district in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Maa Jhanjiri Mangala Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Maa Jhanjiri Mangala Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Maa Jhanjiri Mangala Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (25 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (22 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Maa Jhanjiri Mangala Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Maa Jhanjiri Mangala Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Maa Jhanjiri Mangala Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Maa Jhanjiri Mangala Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Maa Jhanjiri Mangala Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Board of Secondary Education, Odisha, Ravenshaw Radio, Cuttack Chandi Temple, Link Road, Cuttack, Barabati Stadium.
